RULING:(CONTINUE TO FEB.26, 2003 FOR ORAL ARGUMENT OF THE TENTATIVE RULING). THE OPPOSING PARTY WAS NOT ALLOWED TO ARGUE THE MATTER, BECAUSE THE HE DID NOT GIVE SUFFICENT NOTICE TO APPEAR IN COURT. MR. CELAYA-REPRESENTING THE MOVING PARTY IS NOT THE COUNSEL ON RECORD, HE APPEARED IN COURT JUST TO OBSERVED.HENCE, JUDGE ALVARADO,CONTINUE THE MATTER AS TO THE HEARING OF THE ARGUMENT RE TENTATIVE RULING. IN THE MEANTIME TENTATIVE RULING WILL REMAIN PENDING THE DATE SET FOR THE ARGUMENT OF THE SAME TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY.

(TENTATIVE RULING)SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND.(302/PA/NATASHA-EX)ROBERT BALIAN # 5220
